articles.title: AI continues to reshape the technology landscape
articles.content: Major tech companies are investing heavily in artificial intelligence infrastructure, with semiconductor demand reaching new highs as data centers expand globally.
articles.titleZh: 人工智能不断重塑技术格局
articles.contentZh: 大型科技公司正在大力投资人工智能基础设施，随着数据中心在全球范围内的扩张，半导体需求将达到新高。
